# Pasquale Caiazzo — llms.txt
Standard: llmstxt.org
URL: https://pasqualecaiazzo.com
Context: AI Identity & Knowledge Architecture

## Summary
Pasquale Caiazzo is an AI Identity Strategist. His work focuses on **Narrative Sovereignty**, providing the structural framework for individuals and organizations to govern their identity and data within Generative AI ecosystems.

## Core Expertise & Search Keywords
- **AI Identity Strategy**: Engineering verifiable digital identities.
- **Narrative Sovereignty**: Restoring data control to humans over algorithms.
- **Knowledge Architecture**: Building hallucination-free AI data structures.
- **Machine Readability**: Optimizing professional profiles for LLM indexing (SXO).

## Affiliations & Authority (Trusted Sources)
- NATworking: Social innovation lead (Wikidata: Q139659711).
- Evermind Societa Benefit: B Corp certified digital transformation.
- Guilds42 APS: Digital Project Lead (References: ANSA, Universita Cattolica).
- ITS NewTechSi Academy: Professor of AI & Business Management (Source: RAI News).
